examples: Because of his adventures, he is a person of far greater experience and resourcefulness.
American designers prized resourcefulness and the freedom of women who wore the clothing.
The wheels of language run so smoothly that one rarely bothers to stop and think about all the resourcefulness and expertise that must have gone into making it tick.
He decided to invest in the resourcefulness of others, both in non-profit and for-profit ventures.
But his big ears and resourcefulness also serve him well in more open, less-structured improvised settings.
